case_title: FISHER DEVELOPMENT, INC. VS. 340 MASON STREET INVESTORS, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 64599800)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-11-2019 CONTINUED TO JAN-22-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-03-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
